label: 按连通性拆分
description: 以过滤值为边界，将网格中4连通的非边界区域各自拆分为独立网格，输出网格列表。
description-en: Splits a grid into a list of grids by 4-directional connectivity, using the filter value as the boundary; each connected region becomes an independent grid.
icon: 一个网格从中央裂开分离为多块区域，每块区域用不同颜色高亮显示，扁平插画风格，简洁小图标，主色2种。

inputs.name: inputGrids
inputs.label: 输入网格
inputs.description: 待拆分的网格，支持单值或多值；多网格批处理由 dispatcher fanout 处理
inputs.description-en: Grid to split (single- or multi-value); multi-grid batching is handled by the dispatcher fanout.

inputs.name: filterValue
inputs.label: 过滤值
inputs.description: 作为边界的值，该值将被视为隔断，不参与连通性计算
inputs.description-en: The boundary value treated as a barrier; cells with this value are excluded from connectivity.

outputs.name: gridsList
outputs.label: 网格列表
outputs.description: 输入网格的所有4连通区域，每个区域保留原值其余填0，作为独立子分支输出
outputs.description-en: All 4-connected components of the input grid; each keeps original values (others set to 0) and becomes its own child branch.
